title: Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch
stanzas:
<div>
Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch

atchi putchi kathukitchu
majaa gibaar tatchey

nizaar bazaar
malai kuska
katta mitta sketchey

so so sokkuma
girkal vutta break-u ma
kailaasam poi varuva
sketchu romba
sharppu maa

udaar udum pullaikalellam
sketcha paathaa alluma.
ulla poondhu paathaakka
sketchu manasu goldu ma

odu ottam odhungi
nikkura aattam
thottaa dhool parandhidum

sulpat maala
asandhu nikkura aalaa
geththaa goal adichu
coola nikkum aalu.

edu edu edu edu
edu edu edu
gilbert vandi

gilbert vandi
mitta vandi
davlat vandi aanaalum
sketcha pottu
sketcha pottu
sketcha pottu
thookkuvaan (2)

so so sokkuma
girkal vutta break-u ma
kailaasam poi varuva
sketchu romba
sharppu maa

pisiru illaa sketcha poda
namma kitta aalirukku
olinji ulari peela vitta
mirattalaana ridu unakku

scentiment-ah scena potta
sevulu mela pura vudu
sunda kanji sumaar moonji
yaaraanaalum kalaichidu

atchi putchi kathukitchu
majaa gibaar tatchey

nizaar bazaar
malai kuska
katta mitta sketchey

jallikatta thokka
velakkaaran pottam sketchu
avanukku Tamilnade
pottadhu paar sketchu

seethaava thookka
ravananthaan potaan
sketchu

raavanukku baanathaala
pottan raman sketchu

roudy dha-dhaa
revalvar ikkeedha
suttaa scena-aayidum

dheko saalaa
godhavula kaala
thorathi thoosi thattum
takkeraana aalu.

edu edu edu edu
edu edu edu
gilbert vandi

gilbert vandi
mitta vandi
davlat vandi aanaalum
sketcha pottu
sketcha pottu
sketcha pottu
thookkuvaan (2)

so so sokkuma
girkal vutta break-u ma
kailaasam poi varuva
sketchu romba
sharppu maa

udaar udum pullaikalellam
sketcha paathaa alluma.
ulla poondhu paathaakka
sketchu manasu goldu ma

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the fun and lively moments in the movie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Sketch, this song accompanies scenes of festive gatherings, highlighting the characters' carefree and joyful interactions.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Vijay Chandar and composed by Thaman S.

When was the song released?

Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch was released on December 25, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch from the movie Sketch is an upbeat and energetic track that encapsulates the spirit of celebration. It showcases the joy and excitement of the characters as they engage in lively festivities. The catchy beats and vibrant lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and encourage listeners to dance along. Overall, the song serves as a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Atchi Putchi Lyrics Sketch is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Vijay Chandar's energetic vocals and Thaman S's catchy beats, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the lively world of Sketch and let the music take over your spirit!
